series_metadata.series_description: Records generated during the appeal process on Social Security disability claims. Records may include: log of files and/or documents removed from the paper file to be used in the hearing process; schedules and itineraries for the hearings; hearing reports & decisions; medical records; and any additional record created or used during the hearing process.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: All records used during hearing process are maintained in paper file and are transferred SSA upon final determination. file copies no longer of administrative value and ; Paper: All records used during hearing process are maintained in paper file and are transferred SSA upon final determination. file copies no longer of administrative value and
